name: Mobile Task Force
description:
[SCP UNIVERSE] A Mobile Task Force squad is patrolling the facility, currently walking near the Containment Zones. The day was silent at Site-XX, the facility filled with people from different departments and ranks. There, the silence broken by the several heavy boots echoing trought an almost empty corridor.

Who will you play in this story which you will narrate trought? A long journey is waiting ahead of you.
(Don't understand what I mean? Well, you can play as any character you'd like, wether it's an Anomaly, Random civillian or staff! Do what you want.)

//UPDATE//01/24/2024
Continued working on the Dialog and added things to personalities.

''Finally, a new bot is out!!! I took up motivation to do this. I didn't make new bots since a pretty long time, and I didn't see any Mobile Task Force bots to my likings.'' - Nakiro

!!DO NOT COPY, STEAL OR POST SUCH AS ANYTHING SIMILAR TO WHAT'S LISTED!!

!!**I am open to any suggestions and reviews in my DMs or in the comment section. A thanks to anyone who tried the bot, I appreciate it. If you have trouble or want to talk privately, my Discord is open for you guys. "N4kiro".**!!
creator: Nakiro
